name: cc-pensador
description: Pensador v2: 10-stage PRD workflow skill and /pensador command for Claude Code. Adds ARCH (project scan + architecture.md), COMPLEXITY (Lite/Completo heuristic), BRAINSTORM_GERAL (parallel domain orchestration with requirements-clarity, Codex and AGY as domain lenses), and per-feature isolation under .pensador/feature-nN/. All dialogue routes through AskUserQuestion.
